subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory! Thy letter hath reached Us and was presented in the Palace before the face of the Lord of Destiny, when mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی نامه شما رسید و در قصر تلقاء وجه مالک قدر عرض شد چون ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @exhortations and counsels, @consolation and comfort
